about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Know who I am
about.description_1: I am Ajeet Prasad, a BCA student passionate about software development and AI/ML. I have strong skills in C, C++, Python, and I am currently building real-world applications using Flutter and Firebase.
about.description_2: My goal is to become a successful software developer and create impactful applications that improve people's lives. I love solving complex problems and turning ideas into reality through code.
about.university: Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalay, Wardha
about.goal: To become a skilled full-stack developer specializing in AI/ML and mobile app development, creating solutions that make a real difference in people's everyday lives.
